zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Tracy於1497年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓時，她的父親Richard Tracy Esq31歲，母親Amy Pargiter23歲。她和John Edward de clayton至少有1個兒子。她去世於1564年在英國英格蘭享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Tracy于1497年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓时，她的父亲Richard Tracy Esq31岁，母亲Amy Pargiter23岁。她和John Edward de clayton至少有1个儿子。她去世于1564年在英国英格兰享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Tracy was born in 1497, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Richard Tracy Esq, was 31 and her mother, Amy Pargiter, was 23. She had at least 1 son with John Edward de clayton. She died in 1564, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Tracy est née en 1497, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Tracy Esq, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Amy Pargiter, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec John Edward de clayton. Elle est décédée en 1564, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Tracy 1497 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Tracy Esq 31 und ihre Mutter Amy Pargiter 23. Sie hatte mit John Edward de clayton mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1564 im Alter von 67 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Tracy è nata il nel 1497 nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Richard Tracy Esq, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Amy Pargiter, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con John Edward de clayton. Morì nel 1564, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.Ledbury, Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアレドブリー

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Tracyが1497年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトッドイントンで生まれた時，父Richard Tracy Esqは31歳，母Amy Pargiterは23歳であった。彼女はJohn Edward de claytonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1564年にイギリスイギリスで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Tracy(이)가 1497년 영국 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Tracy Esq(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amy Pargiter(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 John Edward de clayton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1564년 영국 잉글랜드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Tracy nasceu em 1497, em Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Tracy Esq, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Amy Pargiter, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com John Edward de clayton. Ela faleceu em 1564, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Tracy родилась в 1497 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Tracy Esq было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Amy Pargiter, 23. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от John Edward de clayton. Она умерла в 1564 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Tracy nació en 1497, en Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Tracy Esq, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Amy Pargiter, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con John Edward de clayton. Murió en 1564, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
